partners.title: Partnerships for ticketing, experiences and travel | AJSEE
partners.description: Become an AJSEE partner. We help ticketing platforms, promoters, accommodation and travel partners reach audiences when they are planning experiences.
partners.ogDescription: AJSEE connects event discovery, tickets, accommodation and related services into a natural user journey from inspiration to action.

partner-headline: Partnerships that turn discovery into relevant demand
partner-intro: AJSEE is where people discover events and start planning their free time. We help ticketing platforms, promoters, accommodation partners and other relevant brands reach audiences when genuine interest is forming. The collaboration is built fairly: users discover your offer through AJSEE, while purchase, booking and the customer relationship remain in your hands.
partner-benefit1-desc: People interested in culture, sport, travel and live experiences.
partner-benefit2-desc: Your events or offers presented in a context that helps users decide.
partner-benefit3-desc: Users move directly into your sales or booking environment.
partner-benefit4-desc: The transaction, terms and customer relationship remain under your brand.
partners-description: AJSEE is open to collaboration with ticketing platforms, promoters, cultural institutions, cities, destinations, producers, accommodation partners and technology providers that naturally extend the journey from event discovery to the actual experience.
partner-focus-title: What types of partnerships we are currently developing
partner-focus-intro: AJSEE is currently developing partnerships mainly around tickets, accommodation and services connected to travel for experiences. At the same time, we are open to other collaborations that naturally fit the user journey and bring clear value.
partner-focus-item-1-text: Ticketing platforms, promoters and partners for concerts, theatre, festivals and sports events.
partner-focus-item-2-text: Partners that complement travel for experiences with quality stays, logistics or trip planning.
partner-focus-item-3-text: Venues, cities and destinations that want to make their programme more visible and attract visitors naturally.
partner-focus-item-4-text: Collaborations that support event discovery, offer distribution, data connection or higher-quality content.
partner-collaboration-intro: Every partner has a different product, audience and sales model. That is why we look for a form of collaboration that makes sense for both your offer and AJSEE users. It can be a simple link, a themed recommendation, a dedicated content page or a deeper technical connection.
partner-collaboration-item-1-text: Users discover your event or service with us and complete the purchase or booking directly with you.
partner-collaboration-item-2-text: We can place your offer into the context of a specific city, season, type of experience or travel plan.
partner-collaboration-item-3-text: We help present your offer naturally and clearly at the moment when users are planning the next step.
partner-collaboration-item-4-text: For selected partnerships, we can work with data feeds, APIs or other partner interfaces so that your offer on AJSEE is accurate, up to date and well connected to the next steps.
partner-process-intro: AJSEE is at an early stage and we are building partnerships step by step. We are looking for connections that naturally fit the world of events, travel and leisure. We are not trying to build the longest possible partner list, but collaborations that make sense for users, partners and the long-term development of AJSEE.
partner-process-step-1-text: We briefly discuss your offer, expectations and where the collaboration could create value for both sides.
partner-process-step-2-text: Together, we clarify which form of involvement makes the most sense — from a simple link to a deeper content or technical partnership.
partner-process-step-3-text: We prepare content, links, measurement or technical setup on the AJSEE side and connect them to the partner’s materials or solution.
partner-process-step-4-text: After launch, we monitor how users respond to the collaboration — for example through interest, clicks or feedback. This allows us to gradually refine the partnership.
partner-process-note: AJSEE helps users discover the offer and make a better decision. The purchase, booking or confirmation then happens directly with the partner.
partner-value-title: What do you gain by partnering with us?
partner-value-intro: AJSEE helps partners reach audiences at the moment when people are looking for inspiration and planning where to go or travel next. Our goal is not just to redirect users, but to present your offer in a context that increases its relevance and makes the decision easier.
partner-value-item-1-text: Your event or service appears when users are actively deciding how to spend their free time meaningfully.
partner-value-item-2-text: From AJSEE, we guide users directly to your sales or booking channel. Purchase, booking and customer communication remain in your hands.
partner-value-item-3-text: We place your offer organically into themed selections and recommendations, helping users understand its value in a broader context.
partner-value-item-4-text: The partnership can be built gradually — from a simple start to deeper development based on data, feedback and real user interest.
partner-contact-intro: We are looking for partners who want to become part of a natural journey from event discovery to the actual experience. If you believe your offer could be relevant for AJSEE users, we would be happy to hear from you. Together, we can explore where the collaboration could create the strongest value.
partner-placeholder-company: E.g. the name of your company or project
partner-placeholder-message: Briefly describe your offer, target audience or idea for how we could work together.
partner-success-msg: Thank you. We have received your message and will get back to you soon.
partner-error-email: Please enter a valid business e-mail.
partner-error-msg: Something went wrong. Please try again or e-mail us at adam@ajsee.cz.
partner-error-company: Please enter your company or brand name.
partner-error-name: Please enter your name and role.
